trends.label: real
trends.title: AI Agent 生态持续扩展
trends.text: 多 agent、工具调用、浏览器操作等方向正在从 demo 走向生产

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 视频生成竞赛加速
trends.text: 多家公司发布视频生成模型，质量和速度都在快速提升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AGI 叙事再次升温
trends.text: AGI 时间线预测频繁出现，但具体评估标准仍然模糊

trends.label: watch
trends.title: Benchmark 刷新频率加快
trends.text: 模型性能天花板持续提升，但实际应用差距仍待验证

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 监管政策收紧
trends.text: 全球多地出台 AI 相关法规，合规成本上升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AI 替代一切的叙事
trends.text: AI 在特定任务上表现优异，但通用替代仍需时间

cover.title: SpheRoPE: Zero-Shot Optimization-Free 360 Panorama Generation with Spherical RoPE
cover.summary: We present a zero-shot, training-free and optimization-free framework for generating 360 panoramic images and videos by directly injecting spherical priors into pre-trained diffusion transformers.…
cover.why_it_matters: SpheRoPE 降低了视觉内容创作门槛，非设计师也能做出专业素材
cover.content_angle: 拿 SpheRoPE 生成一组作品截图，发帖「AI 做的图/视频能到什么水平了」

cover.title: Goku: A Million-Scale Universal Dataset and Benchmark for Instruction-Based Video Editing
cover.summary: Existing instruction-based video editing datasets commonly focus on single-task appearance editing, failing to meet the complex creative demands of real-world scenarios. To bridge this gap, we…
cover.why_it_matters: Goku 提供了新的评估标准，帮助判断哪些模型真正好用
cover.content_angle: 实测 Goku 做一个具体任务，发帖「这个 AI 工具能帮你省多少时间」
